# PERF-046 positive: strings.TrimSpace used in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-046-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Trim(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Param("name")
	clean := strings.TrimSpace(name)
	c.String(http.StatusOK, clean)
}
